series_metadata.series_description: Records contain federal grants applications to provide for access/visitation services in the county offices. Includes proposal, grant agreements, allocation letters, financial information, and quarterly activity reports monitoring compliance.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 3 years, then destroy provided state and federal audits are completed and released. ; Paper: Retain in office 1 year, store in records center for 2 years, then destroy provided state and federal audits are completed and released., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
